text: I'll start with Round 1 - exploring all crates in the workspace.

tool_uses.name: Agent
tool_uses.input:
{"description": "Explore rust/crates/ directory", "subagent_type": "Explore", "prompt": "Explore the rust/crates/ directory. List every crate (subdirectory) found there. For each crate, read its Cargo.toml to get the package name and description, and read its src/lib.rs (or src/main.rs if no lib.rs) to understand what it does. Return a structured list of all crates with:
1. Directory name
2. Package name from Cargo.toml
3. One-line description of what the crate does

Be thorough - check every subdirectory under rust/crates/."}
